commands.review_summary:
The PR hoists selected GitHub Actions expressions into environment variables, validates Docker label names, URL-encodes thread-ownership forwarder path segments, adjusts Gateway security error wording, makes macOS Swift formatting edits, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. for source inspection: current main shows direct workflow interpolation, raw Docker Go-template label insertion, raw thread-ownership URL path segments, and the TLS wording contract. I did not establish a live exploit path in this read-only review, so runtime reproduction remains medium-confidence.
commands.review_followup: External security PR needs maintainer security/workflow review, green exact-head CI, and stronger contributor-supplied real behavior proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's real environment proof.
